description: init the DEFT AOI loop state, then run train/retrain/mine/gate iterations until the KPI target is met (destructive)
rules: destructive: trains and retrains TAO Visual ChangeNet, runs docker --gpus all, gates deployment
exactly one user gate (Pre-Flight Summary) before any side-effecting step; autonomous after
disk is canonical: re-read deft_state.json + loop_log.jsonl before every stage; one log entry per stage
EA variant: ingests customer pre-generated NG/OK pairs (no inline AnomalyGen); synth + real share one k-NN, no SDG bypass
every stage writes absolute host paths under RESULTS_DIR/iter<N>/; reject paths outside the workspace
hard stops are never auto-retried (missing/empty pre-gen dirs, train/val leakage, silent-drop, AMP mismatch, CSV failure)
usage: Set WORKSPACE (specs/train/kpi/augmentation root), KPI_TARGET, MAX_ITERATIONS, NUM_GPUS, NUM_EPOCHS, and RECORD_STORE (the run's RESULTS_DIR). init_deft_state seeds deft_state.json; the loop then drives baseline -> RCA -> ingest -> mine -> retrain. Output: deft_state.json.
limitation: Requires docker + nvidia-container-toolkit, NVIDIA GPU(s), and HF_TOKEN (NGC_API_KEY gates container pulls); not for standalone training, one-off inference, generic anomaly generation, or RCA-only analysis. AnomalyGen is not run inline — the customer pre-generates synthetic pairs out-of-band. The train container URI resolves from versions.yaml via TAO_SKILL_BANK_PATH.
